title: YTsaurus operation specification
description: JSON Schema for YTsaurus operation specs accepted by run_operation-style APIs. YSON values are represented in JSON directly unless a YSON node has attributes; attributed nodes must be encoded as an object with exactly two keys: '$value' for the node payload and '$attributes' for the attribute map. For example, the YSON rich path <append=%true>//tmp/out is encoded as {'$value':'//tmp/out','$attributes':{'append':true}}.

pool.description: Name of the scheduler pool in which the operation runs. If omitted, the cluster usually derives the pool from the authenticated user.

weight.description: Operation weight inside the pool; larger values receive a larger fair-share portion relative to sibling operations.

pool_trees.description: Pool trees where operation jobs are allowed to run.

tentative_pool_trees.description: Deprecated: tentative pool trees where jobs may be tried if performance does not degrade.

resource_limits.description: Aggregate resource limits for all jobs of this operation, for example user_slots, cpu, memory, gpu, or network.

max_share_ratio.description: Maximum share of the parent pool resources that may be allocated to this operation.

time_limit.description: Overall operation time limit in milliseconds; the scheduler stops the operation after the limit expires.

title.description: Human-readable operation title displayed in UI and diagnostics.

owners.description: Users who are granted rights for mutating actions on the operation and its jobs.

acl.description: Operation access control list. Only read and manage permissions are meaningful for operation ACL entries.

max_stderr_count.description: Maximum number of job stderr blobs saved by the operation controller.

alias.description: Optional user-provided alias for later operation lookup.

max_failed_job_count.description: Number of failed jobs after which the operation is considered failed.

unavailable_chunk_strategy.description: Strategy applied when input data is unavailable at operation startup.

unavailable_chunk_tactics.description: Tactics applied when input data becomes unavailable while the operation is running.

chunk_availability_policy.description: Policy for handling unavailable erasure-coded chunks.

scheduling_tag.description: Legacy single node tag required for starting jobs.

scheduling_tag_filter.description: Logical expression over node tags used to choose nodes for job startup.

max_data_size_per_job.description: Deprecated alias for max_data_weight_per_job: hard cap on input data size per job in bytes.

max_data_weight_per_job.description: Hard cap on input data weight per job in bytes.

data_weight_per_job.description: Recommended input data weight per job in bytes. Composite operations usually use the stage-specific data_weight/data_size options instead.

secure_vault.description: Map of secret values made available to user jobs and hidden from unauthorized users.

stderr_table_path.description: Existing table path where complete job stderr data is written.

core_table_path.description: Existing table path where job core dumps are written.

redirect_stdout_to_stderr.description: Operation-level convenience flag requesting user job stdout redirection into stderr when supported by the client or operation type.

input_query.description: Query used to pre-filter input rows before they are passed to jobs.

omit_inaccessible_columns.description: Whether inaccessible columns should be omitted from input instead of failing the operation.

job_node_account.description: Account used for files with job stderr and input context.

suspend_operation_if_account_limit_excee.description: Whether to suspend the operation instead of failing when an account limit is exceeded.

enable_job_splitting.description: Whether adaptive job splitting is enabled.

use_columnar_statistics.description: Whether per-column statistics are enabled for operation planning.

sampling.description: Sampling settings for operations that support sampled input processing.

max_speculative_job_count_per_task.description: Maximum number of speculative jobs allowed per task.

job_speculation_timeout.description: Timeout in milliseconds before job speculation may be considered.

try_avoid_duplicating_jobs.description: Whether the scheduler should try to avoid duplicating jobs where possible.

description.description: Longer description shown on the operation page.
examples: Aggregates yesterday's access logs by host.

started_by.description: Structured information about the component or user that started the operation.

annotations.description: Arbitrary operation annotations stored with the operation and displayed by supporting tooling.

input_table_paths.description: Input table paths. Rich YPath attributes such as columns, ranges, transaction_id, timestamp, and rename_columns are encoded with the '$value'/'$attributes' YSON wrapper.

output_table_paths.description: Output table paths. Attributes such as append, sorted_by, row_count_limit, and create are encoded with the '$value'/'$attributes' wrapper.

output_table_path.description: Single output table path used by merge, sort, and remote_copy operations.

auto_merge.description: Auto-merge settings for output chunks produced by operations that support post-processing merges.

table_path.description: Table path used by erase operations; may include ranges using rich YPath attributes.

reduce_combiner.description: Reduce-combiner user job specification for map_reduce operations.

tasks.description: Vanilla operation tasks keyed by task name.

map_job_io.description: I/O settings of map jobs in map_reduce operations.

sort_job_io.description: I/O settings of sort jobs in sort and map_reduce operations.

reduce_job_io.description: I/O settings of reduce jobs in map_reduce operations.

partition_job_io.description: I/O settings of partition jobs in sort operations.

merge_job_io.description: I/O settings of merge jobs in sort operations.

data_size_per_job.description: Approximate input data size per job in bytes for map, reduce, merge, and join_reduce operations.

job_count.description: Approximate number of jobs for map, reduce, merge, and vanilla task specs.

reduce_by.description: Columns used to group rows for reduce and map_reduce operations.

sort_by.description: Columns by which input tables must be sorted, or by which output is sorted for sort operations.

join_by.description: Columns used to join foreign tables in join_reduce operations.

consider_only_primary_size.description: Whether job splitting considers only primary table size.

enable_key_guarantee.description: Whether standard reduce key guarantee is enabled; disabling may help process skewed keys.

ordered.description: Whether ordered mode is enabled for job splitting.

map_job_count.description: Approximate number of map jobs in a map_reduce operation.

data_size_per_map_job.description: Alias for data_weight_per_map_job. Approximate input data weight per map job in bytes.

map_selectivity_factor.description: Expected fraction of source data remaining after the map phase.

mapper_output_table_count.description: Number of mapper output tables in addition to the mandatory intermediate output.

intermediate_data_medium.description: Medium used for intermediate data chunks.

sort_locality_timeout.description: Locality timeout for sorting stages, in milliseconds.

data_size_per_sort_job.description: Alias for data_weight_per_sort_job. Approximate input data weight per sort job in bytes.

data_size_per_reduce_job.description: Alias for data_weight_per_reduce_job. Approximate input data weight per reduce job in bytes.

force_reduce_combiners.description: Whether reduce combiners are forced to start.

merge_by.description: Columns by which output tables must be sorted for sorted merge mode.

force_transform.description: Whether merge must read and rewrite all input data even if it could otherwise reuse chunks.

schema_inference_mode.description: Schema inference mode for operations that may create or rewrite a table schema.

data_size_per_partition_job.description: Alias for data_weight_per_partition_job. Approximate input data weight per partition job in bytes.

data_size_per_sorted_merge_job.description: Alias for data_weight_per_sorted_merge_job. Approximate input data weight per sorted merge job in bytes.

samples_per_partition.description: Number of samples per partition, mostly for dynamic tables.

cluster_connection.description: Connection configuration for the source cluster in remote_copy.

copy_attributes.description: Whether remote_copy copies attributes of the input table when there is a single input.

intermediate_direct_upload_node_count.description: Direct upload node count for intermediate data.

intermediate_data_sync_on_close.description: Whether intermediate data is synchronously closed.

fast_intermediate_medium_limit.description: Limit for data written to fast intermediate medium in bytes.

debug_artifacts_account.description: Account for debug artifacts such as stderr and input context; alias: job_node_account.

max_primary_data_weight_per_job.description: Hard cap on primary input data weight per job in bytes.

max_compressed_data_size_per_job.description: Hard cap on compressed input data size per job in bytes.

max_primary_compressed_data_size_per_job.description: Hard cap on primary compressed input data size per job in bytes.

max_core_info_count.description: Maximum number of saved core infos.

job_proxy_memory_overcommit_limit.description: Job proxy memory overcommit limit in bytes.

job_proxy_ref_counted_tracker_log_period.description: Logging period for job proxy ref-counted tracker.

time_limit_job_fail_timeout.description: Timeout for failing jobs when operation time limit is hit.

aco_name.description: Access control object name used for operation permissions.

add_authenticated_user_to_acl.description: Whether to add the authenticated user to the operation ACL.

enable_secure_vault_variables_in_job_she.description: Expose secure vault variables in job shell.

issue_temporary_token.description: Whether to issue a temporary token for jobs.

temporary_token_environment_variable_nam.description: Environment variable name for the temporary token.

min_locality_input_data_weight.description: Minimum input data weight for locality-aware scheduling.

job_proxy_memory_digest.description: Log digest config for job proxy memory estimation.

job_proxy_resource_overdraft_memory_mult.description: Memory multiplier for job proxy resource overdraft.

slice_erasure_chunks_by_parts.description: Whether erasure chunks are sliced by parts.

enable_legacy_live_preview.description: Whether legacy live preview is enabled.

use_chunk_slice_statistics.description: Whether chunk slice statistics are used.

enable_read_size_estimation.description: Whether read size estimation is enabled.

ban_nodes_with_failed_jobs.description: Whether nodes with failed jobs are banned for this operation.

ignore_job_failures_at_banned_nodes.description: Ignore failures observed at banned nodes.

fail_on_all_nodes_banned.description: Fail operation if all nodes become banned.

omit_inaccessible_rows.description: Omit inaccessible rows instead of failing.

additional_security_tags.description: Additional security tags attached to operation jobs.

waiting_job_timeout.description: Timeout for jobs waiting for resources.

lock_output_dynamic_tables.description: Whether output dynamic tables are locked.

allow_output_dynamic_tables.description: Whether output dynamic tables are allowed.

enable_write_buffer_size_estimation.description: Whether write buffer size estimation is enabled.

enable_dynamic_store_read.description: Whether dynamic store reads are enabled.

controller_agent_tag.description: Controller agent tag requested for this operation.

experiment_overrides.description: Experiment overrides applied to this operation.

enable_trace_logging.description: Whether trace logging is enabled for this operation.

input_table_columnar_statistics.description: Columnar statistics config for input tables.

user_file_columnar_statistics.description: Columnar statistics config for user files.

suspend_on_job_failure.description: Suspend operation when a job fails.

enable_root_volume_disk_quota.description: Whether root volume disk quota is enabled.

default_base_layer_path.description: Default base layer path for user jobs.

batch_row_count.description: Row count per batch for supported operations.

ignore_yt_variables_in_shell_environment.description: Ignore YT_* variables in job shell environment.

enable_multiple_jobs_in_allocation.description: Enable multiple jobs in a single allocation.

max_concurrent_schedule_allocation_calls.description: Limit on concurrent controller ScheduleAllocation calls.

schedule_in_single_tree.description: Schedule jobs in a single selected regular pool tree.

consider_guarantees_for_single_tree.description: Consider guarantees when selecting a single tree.

use_default_tentative_pool_trees.description: Use default tentative pool trees from scheduler config.

update_preemptible_allocations_list_logg.description: Logging period for preemptible allocations list updates.

custom_profiling_tag.description: Custom profiling tag for scheduler metrics.

scheduling_segment.description: Scheduling segment requested for the operation.

scheduling_modules.description: Scheduling modules/segments/data centers requested for the operation.

is_gang.description: Whether the operation is treated as gang-scheduled.

erase_trees_with_pool_limit_violations.description: Erase trees with pool limit violations from scheduling choices.

apply_specified_resource_limits_to_deman.description: Apply specified resource limits to demand.

allow_idle_cpu_policy.description: Allow jobs to run with idle CPU policy.

strong_guarantee_resources.description: Strong resource guarantees for the operation.

compressed_data_size_per_job.description: Approximate compressed input data size per job in bytes.

locality_timeout.description: Locality timeout for simple operation jobs.

output_paths.description: Alias for output_table_paths or output_table_path depending on operation.

single_chunk_teleport_strategy.description: Strategy for teleporting a single chunk in unordered merge.

use_new_sorted_pool.description: Use the new sorted pool implementation.

min_maniac_data_weight.description: Minimum data weight for maniac sorted-merge behavior.

validate_key_column_types.description: Validate key column types in reduce.

partition_data_weight.description: Approximate partition data weight in bytes.

partition_data_weight_for_merging.description: Partition data weight used when final partition merging is enabled.

data_weight_per_intermediate_partition_j.description: Data weight per intermediate partition job.

max_chunk_slice_per_shuffle_job.description: Maximum chunk slices per shuffle job.

max_chunk_slice_per_intermediate_partiti.description: Maximum chunk slices per intermediate partition job.

max_shuffle_data_slice_count.description: Maximum total data slices in shuffle pool.

max_merge_data_slice_count.description: Maximum total data slices in merge pool.

enable_partitioned_data_balancing.description: Balance partition jobs by uncompressed input data size.

enable_intermediate_output_recalculation.description: Regenerate unavailable intermediate chunks by restarting jobs.

compressed_data_size_per_partition_job.description: Compressed input data size per partition job.

simple_sort_locality_timeout.description: Locality timeout for simple sort jobs.

simple_merge_locality_timeout.description: Locality timeout for simple merge jobs.

max_input_data_weight.description: Hard limit on allowed input data weight for sort.

compressed_data_size_per_map_job.description: Compressed input data size per map job.

enable_table_index_if_has_trivial_mapper.description: Enable table indexes for trivial mapper in map-reduce.

compute_pivot_keys_from_samples.description: Compute pivot keys from samples for trivial mapper.

force_copy_system_attributes.description: Force copying system attributes in remote_copy.

concurrency.description: Number of chunks copied concurrently in remote_copy.

block_buffer_size.description: Block buffer size for remote_copy in bytes.

erasure_chunk_repair_delay.description: Delay before repairing erasure chunks during remote_copy.

repair_erasure_chunks.description: Repair erasure chunks during remote_copy if parts are missing.

use_remote_master_caches.description: Use remote master caches in remote_copy jobs.

fail_on_job_restart.description: Fail the operation if a job is restarted.

input_schema.description: Schema of rows produced by input_query.

data_weight_per_sort_job.description: Approximate input data weight per sort job in bytes.

data_weight_per_partition_job.description: Approximate input data weight per partition job in bytes.

data_weight_per_sorted_merge_job.description: Approximate input data weight per sorted merge job in bytes.

data_weight_per_map_job.description: Approximate input data weight per map job in bytes.

data_weight_per_reduce_job.description: Approximate input data weight per reduce job in bytes.

ysonNode.description: Any YSON node encoded in JSON. Nodes without attributes are encoded as the corresponding JSON value. Nodes with attributes are encoded as {'$value': <node>, '$attributes': {<name>: <node>, ...}}.

attributedYsonNode.description: YSON node with attributes. Use this wrapper only when the original YSON node has a non-empty attribute map; '$value' contains the original node value and '$attributes' contains its attributes.

$value.description: Original YSON node value without attributes.

$attributes.description: YSON attributes attached to the node.

ypath.description: Cypress path or rich YPath. Plain paths are strings. Paths with attributes use the $value/$attributes wrapper with rich YPath attributes.

ypathList.description: List of Cypress paths or rich YPaths.

aclEntry.description: ACL entry used in operation and intermediate data ACLs.

subjects.description: Users or groups affected by the ACL entry.

permissions.description: Permissions granted or denied by the entry.

userJob.description: User job section used by mapper, reducer, reduce_combiner, and vanilla tasks.

command.description: Command executed via bash -c in the job sandbox.

file_paths.description: Files and tables from Cypress downloaded to the job sandbox; file path attributes such as file_name, executable, format, and bypass_artifact_cache use the '$value'/'$attributes' wrapper.

docker_image.description: Docker image used as root filesystem layer.

format.description: Default tabular data format for the job.

input_format.description: Tabular data format at the job input.

output_format.description: Tabular data format at the job output.

output_table_paths.description: Output table paths visible to this user job.

environment.description: Environment variables visible in the job environment.

cpu_limit.description: CPU cores requested for scheduling this job.

gpu_limit.description: GPU units mounted into the job container.

memory_reserve_factor.description: Memory reserve factor applied to the job memory limit.

tmpfs_path.description: Sandbox path where tmpfs is mounted.

max_stderr_size.description: Maximum saved stderr size for this job in bytes.

custom_statistics_count_limit.description: Maximum number of custom statistics written by the job.

job_time_limit.description: Job execution time limit in milliseconds.

enable_input_table_index.description: Whether input table indexes are written to the input stream.

redirect_stdout_to_stderr.description: Whether job stdout is redirected into stderr.

copy_files.description: Whether user files are copied to the sandbox.

use_yamr_descriptors.description: Whether Yamr-style output file descriptor numbering is used.

check_input_fully_consumed.description: Whether the job proxy checks that the user job read all input data.

disk_space_limit.description: Total sandbox disk-space limit in bytes.

port_count.description: Number of ports allocated to the user job.

set_container_cpu_limit.description: Whether to force the container CPU limit; normally not set by users.

network_project.description: Network project assigned to the user job.

disk_request.description: Disk request for jobs, including disk_space, medium, and account when needed.

task_title.description: Task title displayed for this user job.

prepare_time_limit.description: Preparation time limit for the job.

user_job_memory_digest_lower_bound.description: Lower bound for user-job memory digest.

ignore_memory_reserve_factor_less_than_o.description: Ignore memory reserve factor values less than one.

job_proxy_memory_digest.description: Log digest config for job proxy memory estimation.

include_memory_mapped_files.description: Include memory-mapped files in memory accounting.

deterministic.description: Whether job execution is marked deterministic.

interruption_signal.description: Signal used to interrupt the job.

signal_root_process_only.description: Send interruption signal only to the root process.

enable_gpu_layers.description: Enable GPU layers for the job.

cuda_toolkit_version.description: CUDA toolkit version requested by the job.

enable_gpu_check.description: Run GPU checks for the job.

enable_porto.description: Enable Porto containerization for the job.

fail_job_on_core_dump.description: Fail job when it produces a core dump.

enable_fuse.description: Enable FUSE in the job sandbox.

enable_debug_command_line_arguments.description: Enable debug command-line arguments for the job.

profilers.description: Profilers enabled for this user job.

enable_rpc_proxy_in_job_proxy.description: Enable RPC proxy inside job proxy.

enable_shuffle_service_in_job_proxy.description: Enable shuffle service inside job proxy.

rpc_proxy_worker_thread_pool_size.description: RPC proxy worker thread pool size.

fail_on_job_restart.description: Fail operation if this job restarts.

close_stdout_if_unused.description: Close stdout if it is unused by outputs.

enable_fixed_user_id.description: Enable fixed user id inside the job.

sidecars.description: Sidecar jobs keyed by sidecar name.

task.description: Vanilla task specification. It has all user-job fields plus job_count.

job_count.description: Approximate number of jobs for this vanilla task.

job_io.description: I/O settings for this vanilla task.

output_table_paths.description: Output table paths for this vanilla task.

restart_exit_code.description: Exit code that requests a task restart.

restart_completed_jobs.description: Whether completed jobs are restarted when the task restarts.

gang_options.description: Gang scheduling options for this task.

jobIO.description: I/O settings for one operation stage.

table_reader.description: Table reader configuration for job input.

table_writer.description: Table writer configuration for job output.

control_attributes.description: Control attributes configuration written to job streams.

buffer_row_count.description: Maximum number of rows buffered in job proxy.

pipe_io_pool_size.description: Size of the job proxy data-processing pool.

use_adaptive_buffer_row_count.description: Whether adaptive job-proxy row buffering is enabled.

adaptive_row_count_upper_bound.description: Upper bound for adaptive row buffering.

use_delivery_fenced_pipe_writer.description: Whether delivery-fenced pipe writer is used.

block_cache.description: Block cache settings for job I/O.

duration.description: YTsaurus duration value. In operation specs this is commonly supplied as milliseconds, but string forms accepted by YSON duration parsers are allowed for compatibility.

jobResources.description: Scheduler job resources object used for resource limits and guarantees.

memory.description: Memory limit or guarantee in bytes.

pool.description: Pool override for this pool tree.

weight.description: Weight override for this pool tree.

scheduling_tag_filter.description: Node tag filter for this tree.

tentativeTreeEligibility.description: Configuration for deciding whether jobs remain eligible for tentative pool trees.

sample_job_count.description: Number of finished jobs sampled before more jobs are started in a tentative tree.

max_tentative_job_duration_ratio.description: Maximum allowed ratio between tentative-tree and regular-tree average job duration.

min_job_duration.description: Job duration threshold below which tentative-tree duration comparisons are ignored.

ignore_missing_pool_trees.description: Whether missing tentative pool trees are ignored.

max_fails_unknown_exit_code.description: Maximum failures for jobs with an unknown exit code.

max_fails_no_exit_code.description: Maximum failures for jobs without an exit code.

max_fails_per_known_exit_code.description: Map from known exit code to maximum tolerated failures.

fastIntermediateMediumTableWriterConfig.description: Writer settings for fast intermediate media.

enabled.description: Whether columnar statistics fetching is enabled.

cudaProfilerEnvironment.description: Environment variable injected for CUDA profiling.

profiling_probability.description: Probability that profiling is enabled for a job.

run_external_symbolizer.description: Whether to symbolize with an external symbolizer.

sidecarJobSpec.description: Sidecar process specification for a user job.

richYPathAttributes.description: Common rich YPath and operation path attributes.

columns.description: Column filter for an input table.

rename_columns.description: Column rename map for input tables.

transaction_id.description: Transaction id used to access the path.

timestamp.description: Timestamp used to access a dynamic table snapshot.

append.description: Append to output table instead of overwriting.

sorted_by.description: Columns by which the output table is sorted.

row_count_limit.description: Stop once an output table reaches this row count.

create.description: Create the output table if it does not exist.

file_name.description: Sandbox file name for a file path.

executable.description: Whether the file is executable in the sandbox.

format.description: Format used when a file path points to a table.

bypass_artifact_cache.description: Whether to bypass the artifact cache for this file.

richYPath.description: Cypress path or rich YPath. Plain paths are strings. Paths with attributes use the $value/$attributes wrapper with rich YPath attributes.

tableReaderConfig.description: Table reader configuration, including fields inherited from multi-chunk, erasure, replication, remote-reader, block-fetcher, hunk-reader, fragment-reader, dictionary-compression, and workload configs.

suppress_access_tracking.description: Suppress access tracking for input chunks.

suppress_expiration_timeout_renewal.description: Suppress expiration timeout renewal for read data.

unavailable_chunk_strategy.description: Strategy for unavailable chunks while reading.

max_buffer_size.description: Maximum reader buffer size in bytes.

max_parallel_readers.description: Maximum number of parallel chunk readers.

enable_auto_repair.description: Whether erasure chunks may be automatically repaired while reading.

replication_reader_speed_limit_per_sec.description: Speed limit for replication reader in bytes per second.

slow_reader_expiration_timeout.description: Expiration timeout for slow replication readers.

replication_reader_failure_timeout.description: Failure timeout for replication reader operations.

block_rpc_hedging_delay.description: Hedging delay for block RPC requests.

lookup_rpc_hedging_delay.description: Hedging delay for lookup RPC requests.

cancel_primary_block_rpc_request_on_hedg.description: Cancel primary block RPC request when hedging starts.

cancel_primary_lookup_rpc_request_on_hed.description: Cancel primary lookup RPC request when hedging starts.

meta_rpc_timeout.description: Timeout for chunk meta RPC requests.

meta_rpc_hedging_delay.description: Hedging delay for chunk meta RPC requests.

probe_peer_count.description: Number of peers probed for a chunk.

fail_on_no_seeds.description: Fail when no chunk seeds are available.

pass_count.description: Number of passes for chunk peer selection.

peer_expiration_timeout.description: Expiration timeout for cached peer information.

prefer_local_host.description: Prefer local host when selecting chunk peers.

prefer_local_rack.description: Prefer local rack when selecting chunk peers.

prefer_local_data_center.description: Prefer local data center when selecting chunk peers.

enable_workload_fifo_scheduling.description: Enable FIFO scheduling for reader workload.

ban_peers_permanently.description: Ban failing peers permanently for this reader.

chunk_meta_cache_failure_probability.description: Testing probability of chunk meta cache failure.

partial_peer_probing_timeouts.description: Timeouts used for partial peer probing.

suspicious_node_grace_period.description: Grace period before treating a node as suspicious.

window_size.description: Block fetcher window size in bytes.

group_size.description: Block fetcher group size in bytes.

workload_descriptor.description: Workload descriptor for reader scheduling and throttling.

max_total_hunk_length_per_read.description: Maximum total hunk length per read in bytes.

peer_info_expiration_timeout.description: Expiration timeout for cached peer info.

seeds_expiration_timeout.description: Expiration timeout for located chunk seeds.

probe_chunk_set_rpc_timeout.description: Timeout for probe chunk set RPC.

get_chunk_fragment_set_rpc_timeout.description: Timeout for get chunk fragment set RPC.

retry_count_limit.description: Retry count limit for fragment reads.

read_time_limit.description: Read time limit for chunk fragments.

max_inflight_fragment_length.description: Maximum in-flight fragment length in bytes.

prefetch_whole_blocks.description: Prefetch whole blocks while reading fragments.

read_and_cache_whole_blocks.description: Read and cache whole blocks while reading fragments.

max_decompression_blob_size.description: Maximum decompression blob size in bytes.

tableWriterConfig.description: Table writer configuration, including fields inherited from chunk writer, encoding writer, multi-chunk writer, replication writer, erasure writer, block-reorderer, and workload configs.

max_buffer_size.description: Maximum writer buffer size in bytes.

max_data_weight_between_blocks.description: Maximum data weight between blocks in bytes.

use_original_data_weight_in_samples.description: Use original data weight in writer samples.

enable_column_meta_in_chunk_meta.description: Enable column metadata in chunk metadata.

max_meta_size.description: Maximum chunk metadata size in bytes.

testing_delay_before_chunk_close.description: Testing delay before closing a chunk.

send_window_size.description: Writer send window size in bytes.

node_channel.description: RPC channel configuration for writer node connections.

prefer_local_host.description: Prefer local host for write targets.

enable_early_finish.description: Enable early finish for chunk writes.

erasure_window_size.description: Erasure writer window size in bytes.

writer_group_size.description: Writer group size for erasure writes in bytes.

desired_segment_part_size.description: Desired segment part size in bytes.

erasure_store_original_block_checksums.description: Store original block checksums for erasure chunks.

workload_descriptor.description: Workload descriptor for writer scheduling and throttling.

validate_sorted.description: Validate that written rows are sorted.

validate_any_is_valid_yson.description: Validate that Any values contain valid YSON.

explode_on_validation_error.description: Abort hard on validation error for diagnostics.

enable_skynet_sharing.description: Enable Skynet sharing for output chunks.

single_column_group_by_default.description: Put columns into a single column group by default.

enable_row_count_in_columnar_statistics.description: Include row count in columnar statistics.

consider_min_row_range_data_weight.description: Consider minimum row range data weight.

tableSchema.description: YTsaurus table schema: array of column descriptors. Additional column fields are accepted for compatibility.

remoteDynamicStoreReaderConfig.description: Remote dynamic store reader configuration inherited by dynamic table readers.

max_rows_per_server_read.description: Maximum rows returned by one server read.

window_size.description: Streaming reader window size in bytes.

streaming_subrequest_failure_probability.description: Testing probability for streaming subrequest failure.

retry_count.description: Retry count for locating/reading remote stores.

rehash_trial_count.description: Number of rehash trials used to pick a seed.

chunkIndexesWriterConfig.description: Chunk indexes writer configuration inherited by table writers.

top_value_quantile.description: Top-value quantile used by slim versioned writer.

enable_per_value_dictionary_encoding.description: Whether per-value dictionary encoding is enabled.

trial_count.description: Number of trials when building the filter.

bits_per_key.description: Bits per key in the filter.

trial_count.description: Number of trials when building the filter.

bits_per_key.description: Bits per key in the filter.

prefix_lengths.description: Key prefix lengths for which filters are produced.

pipe_delay.description: Artificial delay in job proxy pipes.

fileWriterConfig.description: File writer configuration used by job error-file writer; includes fields inherited from multi-chunk, replication, erasure, block-reorderer, workload, and file chunk writer configs.

block_size.description: File writer block size in bytes.

max_meta_size.description: Maximum chunk metadata size in bytes.

testing_delay_before_chunk_close.description: Testing delay before closing a chunk.

send_window_size.description: Writer send window size in bytes.

node_channel.description: RPC channel configuration for writer node connections.

prefer_local_host.description: Prefer local host for write targets.

enable_early_finish.description: Enable early finish for chunk writes.

erasure_window_size.description: Erasure writer window size in bytes.

writer_group_size.description: Writer group size for erasure writes in bytes.

desired_segment_part_size.description: Desired segment part size in bytes.

erasure_store_original_block_checksums.description: Store original block checksums for erasure chunks.

workload_descriptor.description: Workload descriptor for writer scheduling and throttling.

ysonLeaf.description: Scalar YSON value encoded directly in JSON. Use this for leaf-valued maps such as secure_vault; structured YSON nodes are modeled by dedicated schemas.

skip_null_values.description: Skip null values while writing tabular data.

table_index_column.description: Column name used for table index.

skip_unsupported_types_in_value.description: Skip unsupported types in value field.

missing_value_mode.description: Mode for missing schemaful DSV values.

enable_column_names_header.description: Whether column names header is enabled.

name.description: YT column or protobuf field name.

file_descriptor_set.description: Binary FileDescriptorSet encoded as a string.

max_all_column_names_count.description: Maximum number of all column names.

table_skiff_schemas.description: Table Skiff schemas encoded as YSON values.

write_uint_tag.description: Write explicit YAML tag for uint values.

dataFormatAttributes.description: Known attributes for YTsaurus data formats. The applicable set depends on the format name in $value.

data_format.description: YTsaurus data format. Plain form is a known format name. Attributed form uses $value for the format name and $attributes for format-specific attributes.

controlAttributesConfig.description: Control attributes emitted in job streams.

dynamic_table.description: Whether input is a dynamic table.
